title: Paradise Lost
author: John Milton
tradition_notes: Milton was a Puritan poet and controversialist. Paradise Lost reflects a broadly Protestant and humanist theology, though Milton's own views were heterodox (anti-Trinitarian in De Doctrina Christiana). Classified puritan for his context and influence.
source_edition: Standard Ebooks edition (CC0 editorial work, public domain text)
notes: 12 books, each a single XHTML file with verse-paragraph content. Epic poem -- paragraphs are verse sections separated by blank lines in source.
